events.description: The ego-vehicle moves from the right lane to the left lane on a highway during sunset. / motion-nominated (net sweep +0.140 of width)
The ego-vehicle, already in motion at the start of the clip, completes a lane change from the left lane to the right lane on a highway.

motion-nominated (net sweep +0.102 of width) / The ego-vehicle moves from the right lane to the middle lane to overtake a white pickup truck. / The ego vehicle changes into the leftmost lane to pass a black pickup truck.
motion-nominated (net sweep -0.108 of width) / The ego vehicle moves one lane to the right from the far-left lane.
The ego-vehicle moves one lane to the left, from the right-most lane to the middle lane. / motion-nominated (net sweep +0.111 of width)
After an SUV passes on the left, the ego-vehicle moves into the open lane to its right. / The ego-vehicle merges one lane to the right on a multi-lane highway.
motion-nominated (net sweep -0.141 of width) / The ego vehicle makes a gradual lane change to the right into the adjacent lane.
motion-nominated (net sweep +0.162 of width) / The ego-vehicle moves from the second lane from the left into the leftmost lane.

motion-nominated (net sweep +0.102 of width) / The ego-vehicle moves from the right lane to the middle lane to overtake a white pickup truck. / The ego vehicle changes into the leftmost lane to pass a black pickup truck.

The ego-vehicle moves one lane to the left, from the right-most lane to the middle lane. / motion-nominated (net sweep +0.111 of width) / motion-nominated (net sweep -0.108 of width) / The ego vehicle moves one lane to the right from the far-left lane.
motion-nominated (net sweep -0.141 of width) / The ego vehicle makes a gradual lane change to the right into the adjacent lane.
